data.title: 国际服主线关卡开放：Area19
data.summary: [New Mission Available Notice] Check out Mission Area 19 in the 12/20 (Tue) update. You can earn T7
data.body:
[New Mission Available Notice]

Check out Mission Area 19 in the 12/20 (Tue) update. You can earn T7 Equipment Blueprints from Normal Missions and Juri, Airi, and Izuna's Elephs from Hard Missions!

#BlueArchive![Ur4i88qYkLmsX5vKiDVBgz4RwN1N68fG.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/Ur4i88qYkLmsX5vKiDVBgz4RwN1N68fG.jpg)
